atomic_facts.fact: Six snowman crafts are arranged in a row on a wooden surface.
The crafts are made from white paper tubes decorated to look like snowmen.
Each snowman wears a fleece hat of a different color (green, blue, brown, red, dark brown, light green).
The hats have a tied or fringed top resembling hair or a pom-pom.
Each snowman has a fleece scarf tied around its neck.
The snowmen faces feature drawn eyes, a carrot nose, and a smile.
Black dots are drawn vertically down the front of the paper tubes to represent buttons.
The background is a light-colored wooden surface with visible grain.

spatial: Six snowman crafts are arranged in a slightly fanned-out row across the center of the frame, resting on a light wooden background.

visible_entities.desc: Six snowman-themed gift packages wrapped in white paper with drawn faces, wearing colorful fleece hats and scarves
visible_entities.action: lying stationary on a wooden surface
visible_entities.position: center of the frame, arranged in a slightly overlapping row

The snowmen have drawn orange carrot noses and black dot buttons.
The hat colors include green, blue, brown, and red.
The scarves match or complement the hat colors.

The snowman has a brown scarf.
A hot glue gun is visible on the left side of the frame.
A blue strip of felt is lying on the wooden surface.
The snowman has black dots for eyes and buttons.
The snowman has an orange triangular nose.

spatial: The scene is a top-down view of a crafting table. The snowman craft is held in the center by hands. Crafting supplies like a glue gun, felt strips, and pins are scattered around the periphery on a light wood surface.

atomic_facts.fact: A person is holding a snowman craft made from a white base with a green hat and brown scarf.

spatial: The scene is a top-down view of a crafting project on a wooden table. A snowman craft is held in the center-right, while hands manipulate a blue felt strip on the left. Crafting tools like a glue gun and decorative beads are positioned at the edges of the frame.

visible_entities.desc: A white rectangular box decorated to look like a snowman, featuring a green felt hat with a tassel, a brown felt scarf, a carrot nose, black dot eyes and buttons, and a red heart.

A black and yellow hot glue gun.
Two small, rectangular pieces of brown felt.
A small, clear container filled with red and silver sequins or beads.

atomic_facts.fact: The snowman craft has a green hat made of felt with a tied top creating a tassel effect.
The snowman's face includes an orange triangular nose and black dots for eyes and a mouth.
A hot glue gun is present in the bottom left corner.
The background is a light-colored wooden surface with visible grain.

atomic_facts.fact: There are at least five snowman crafts visible in the cluster.
The snowmen have hats made of tied fabric in red, green, blue, and brown colors.
The snowmen have scarves made of matching or contrasting felt strips tied around their necks.
